results.description: THE USACE KANSAS CITY DISTRICT HARLAN COUNTY LAKE OFFICE REQUIRES A SUPPLY CONTRACT TO PROVIDE CUTTER HEAD SUCTION DREDGE. THE CONTRACTOR SHALL COMPLY WITH ALL LAWS, ORDINANCES, STATUTES, AND REGULATIONS PERTAINING TO SUPPLY AND INCIDENTAL SERVICES.
